basics.name: Jatin Attri
basics.title: Full Stack Developer | MCA Student | UI/UX Enthusiast
basics.summary: High-performing MCA student and Full Stack Developer with a specialized focus on Next.js and the MERN stack. Recently completed a 6-month intensive internship at Code Scaler, developing SEO-optimized, high-performance web architectures. Recognized as a State-Level Winner in digital design and an official member of the CRSU CodeVerse team, blending technical precision with creative UI/UX expertise.

bullets: Mastered modern web architecture using the MERN Stack and Next.js in a professional collaborative environment.
Developed high-performance, SEO-optimized user interfaces and scalable server-side logic.
Executed the full development lifecycle, including version control, advanced debugging, and production-ready deployments.
Collaborating on university-led digital solutions and mentoring peers in modern web frameworks.

achievements.title: Microsoft Industry Insight
achievements.context: Completed advanced sessions on security and tech consulting at the Microsoft Noida 'Taj Mahal' office.

projects.title: First Next.js Frontend Project
bullets: Built a frontend project from scratch exploring the power of server-side rendering, routing, and modern UI design principles.
Deeply understood how performance and design come together to create seamless user experiences.

projects.title: Next.js Performance Project (Live)
bullets: Developed an SEO-optimized frontend application focusing on performance, server-side rendering, and modern UI design principles.

projects.title: Wanderlust (Final Year Project)
bullets: Hotel booking web platform with user accounts, secure payments, Google Maps integration, and admin panel.

projects.title: AI-Integrated Code Editor
bullets: Awarded 2nd Prize. Real-time intelligent coding assistant with live preview and productivity boosters.

extra: Career Goal: To leverage my full-stack expertise and creative background to build a successful motivational e-commerce brand and grow as a tech entrepreneur.
